functions.label: DataCascade
description:
Public data cascade component. Forwards the ref to DataCascadeImpl so consumers
receive the imperative handle on the ref.

functions.label: getCascadeRowLeafDataCacheKey
signature: (nodePath: string[], nodePathMap: Record<string, string>, leafId: string) => string

functions.label: getLeafIdFromCacheKey
description: Returns the leaf ID from a leaf cache key.

functions.label: NumberBadge
description: A badge component to display numbers in a consistent way.

functions.label: toRestorableState
description:
Derives a {@link DataCascadeRestorableState} from a live snapshot,
keeping only the fields meaningful for restoration.

functions.label: useCascadeVirtualizer
signature: >({ overscan, enableStickyGroupHeader, estimatedRowHeight, rows, getScrollElement, onStateChange, initialOffset, initialRect, scrollMargin, initialAnchorItemIndex, isRoot, observeElementOffset, observeElementRect, initialPersistedAnchors, }:

children.label:
{
  overscan,
  enableStickyGroupHeader,
  estimatedRowHeight = 0,
  rows,
  getScrollElement,
  onStateChange,
  initialOffset,
  initialRect,
  scrollMargin,
  initialAnchorItemIndex,
  isRoot = true,
  observeElementOffset,
  observeElementRect,
  initialPersistedAnchors,
}

functions.label: useChildVirtualizerActivation
description:
Opt-in hook that pre-registers a row cell with the child virtualizer
controller and returns whether the cell's heavy content should mount.

Use this in consumer components that render expensive children (e.g.
a full data grid) to defer their mount until the controller's staggered
activation loop reaches this row.  Components that don't need stagger
gating should skip this hook entirely — their content will mount
immediately.
signature: | null; cellId: string; rowIndex: number; }) => boolean

functions.label: useConnectedChildVirtualizer
signature: >({ controller, cellId, rowIndex, rows, estimatedRowHeight, overscan, privateScrollElement, }:

children.label:
{
  controller,
  cellId,
  rowIndex,
  rows,
  estimatedRowHeight,
  overscan,
  privateScrollElement,
}
row
description: The row instance that was interacted with in the group by hierarchy.

children.label: nodePath
description: The path of the row that was interacted with in the group by hierarchy.

children.label: nodePathMap
description: KV record of the path values for the row node.

children.label: scrollToVirtualizedIndex
signature: (offset: number, options: { adjustments?: number | undefined; behavior?: ScrollBehavior | undefined; }) => void

children.label: enqueue
description:
Lightweight registration that makes the scheduler aware of a row cell
before the full child component mounts. Returns a function to "dequeue" the cell.

children.label: isReturningCell
description:
Returns true if the cell has a persisted anchor, meaning it was previously
connected and is now remounting. Allows the cell to bypass the skeleton on
its very first render, before effects fire.

children.label: getScrollMarginForRow
description:
Returns the current start position of a root row from the root
virtualizer's measurements. Unlike the memoized config, this always
reflects the latest measurements, keeping child virtualizers in sync
when the root remeasures items above them.

children.label: clearPersistedAnchor
description:
Removes a persisted anchor for a cell. Called when a row collapses so that
re-expanding goes through the normal stagger/skeleton path.

children.label: hasConnectedChildWithPersistedAnchor
description:
Returns true when at least one connected (non-detached) child has a
persisted scroll anchor. Used by the root virtualizer to decide whether
to yield post-measurement corrections to a child.

interfaces.label: DataCascadeImplRef
description: Definition of the public API ref for the data cascade component.

children.label: getUISnapshotStore
description:
Returns helpers to access a minimal readonly state of the data cascade component.
This can be used as-is or put together leveraging useSyncExternalStore to create a more reactive
component state.

interfaces.label: DataCascadeRestorableState
description:
Serializable subset of {@link DataCascadeUISnapshot} that a consumer can
persist and pass back as `initialState` to restore the component.

interfaces.label: DataCascadeUISnapshot
description:
Snapshot of data cascade ui state for use with useSyncExternalStore.
Includes virtualizer-derived state and specific table state.

children.label: scrollAnchorItemIndex
description:
The index of the topmost virtual item that is currently in view,
value is a derivative of the virtualizer's current scroll offset.

children.label: connectedChildren
description:
State of all child virtualizers connected via the controller.
Empty when no children are connected.

children.label: privateScrollElement
description:
When detached, the child uses this element as its own scroll container.
If not provided, the child cannot detach.

misc.label: DataCascadeImplProps
signature: DataCascadeImplBaseProps<G, L> & ({ customTableHeader: (props: { availableColumns: string[]; currentSelectedColumns: string[]; onGroupSelection: (groupByColumn: string[]) => void; selectedRows: string[]; }) => React.ReactNode; tableTitleSlot?: undefined; } | { customTableHeader?: undefined; tableTitleSlot: React.FC<{}>; })

misc.label: DataCascadeRowCellProps
signature: <G, L>) => React.ReactNode; onCascadeLeafNodeExpanded: (args: OnCascadeLeafNodeExpandedArgs<G>) => Promise<L[]>; onCascadeLeafNodeCollapsed?: ((args: OnCascadeLeafNodeCollapsedArgs<G>) => void) | undefined; }

misc.label: GroupNode
description:
Represents a group node, with a base expectation that it is a document with a unique identifier, with specific properties.
It can also have children, which are other group nodes.
